data.title: Local Token Estimate via chars÷4 (Not Provider-Reported)
data.rationale: Show context window usage as local estimate: (total_chars + 3) / 4 across composed system prompt + message history. ±20% accuracy. Good enough for 'am I about to run out?' without touching vendored ailang/ fork or per-provider adapters.

data.title: Per-Model Context Window Limits in Runtime
data.rationale: Runtime owns per-model context-window table via context_limit_for(). TUI just renders what it's told. openrouter/ prefix stripped to recurse into known models. Unknown models return 0 → hide ratio. Known: Claude 200K, GPT-4o 128K, Gemini Flash 1M, Gemini Pro 2M.

data.title: Color Escalation at 75% and 90% Thresholds
data.rationale: Yellow at ≥75% context usage, red at ≥90%. ctx segment assembled separately from status bar to avoid chalk nesting issues. When limit === 0, render only token count without ratio.

data.name: Context Usage Estimator
data.description: Pure AILANG module: estimate_tokens(msgs, system) and context_limit_for(model). Char-count based token estimation. Per-model limit lookup with openrouter/ prefix stripping.
